data.name: TemplateNotOwnedByIssuer
data.value: Template does not belong to this Issuer.

data.name: IssuerNotVerified
data.value: Issuer is not verified and cannot issue certificates.

data.name: CrossTenantMismatch
data.value: One or more entities do not belong to the requesting tenant.

data.name: RevocationNotAuthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to revoke a certificate issued by a different Issuer.

data.name: DuplicateActive
data.value: An Active certificate already exists for this Professional and Template. Existing CertificateId: {0}

data.name: AlreadyTerminated
data.value: Certificate '{0}' is already in a terminal state ('{1}') and cannot be revoked.

data.name: RevocationReasonRequired
data.value: Revocation reason is required and must not exceed 500 characters.
